name: pomoblock
description: PomoBlock core implementation from blocksched tasks

scripts.init: npm run build:node && node dist/src/cli.js init
scripts.status: npm run build:node && node dist/src/cli.js status
scripts.build: npm run build:node && npm run build:ui
scripts.copy:schema: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist/src/infrastructure/sql | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path src/infrastructure/sql/schema.sql -Destination dist/src/infrastructure/sql/schema.sql -Force"
